creator: corky1951@comcast.net
text:
Make install of version 1.8.0 failed with the following output:

===>  Building for taskwarrior-1.8.0
make  all-recursive
Making all in src
c++ -DHAVE_CONFIG_H -I. -I..      -O2 -fno-strict-aliasing -pipe -Wall -pedantic -O3 -MT Duration.o -MD -MP -MF .deps/Duration.Tpo -c -o Duration.o Duration.cpp
Duration.cpp:61: error: redefinition of 'Duration::operator time_t()'
Duration.cpp:55: error: 'Duration::operator int()' previously defined here
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/deskutils/taskwarrior/work/task-1.8.0/src.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/deskutils/taskwarrior/work/task-1.8.0.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/deskutils/taskwarrior/work/task-1.8.0.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/deskutils/taskwarrior.
